title: The Unkowned Biome
description: Adventure in The Unkowned Biome with a best experiene
body:
This mod will add the biome call The Unkowned biome to the game the player can discover the secret about the biome.

 

What's in this mod?

 

This mod have New Biome, ancient creature , boss and new dimension

 

This mod will Change all the gameplay in this biome have a special things in this biome waiting to be discovered

 

Features

- The tools will help the player to survive the mobs

- killing mobs and creatures will drop items to open the portal

 

NOTE---

This mod in developing if there have any bugs can report it on comment only 

 

Or The player want to try the experiene can download the alpha in files

 

Future!!!

 

This mod will acquire Geckolib in the future for more experiene to the animals
